coverage_high_severity_only.definition: Violations weighted >= 8 (footpath, road-crossing, traffic-light/zebra, main-road, double-parking, one-way) -- the types that most directly choke traffic flow.

roi_note: CIS covers slightly fewer raw future violations than naive volume ranking (both lists overlap ~80% on the obvious mega-hotspots), but covers +17% more of the HIGH-SEVERITY violation types specifically (footpath/road-crossing/main-road/double-parking/one-way) -- exactly the tradeoff CIS is designed to make. Patrol-hours figures use an illustrative 8-minutes-per-enforcement-action assumption, NOT a value derived from the dataset (which has no officer-time field).
